label: Neural search, RAG & question answering

node.label: Neural search, RAG & question answering
node.definition: Neural search and retrieval-augmented question answering locate evidence, rank it, synthesize an answer, and preserve links between claims and sources.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Neural search, RAG & question answering is modeled as depending on Retrieval-augmented generation, Hybrid retrieval & reranking and feeding downstream nodes such as Autonomous research & AI scientist systems, Tutoring, translation & knowledge work.
examples: atlas downstream link to Autonomous research & AI scientist systems
atlas downstream link to Tutoring, translation & knowledge work
limitations: End-to-end quality is bounded by the weakest data, model, tool, interface, policy, infrastructure, and human-oversight component. Its direct dependencies include Retrieval-augmented generation, Hybrid retrieval & reranking.

dependencies.rationale: Neural search, RAG & question answering integrates Retrieval-augmented generation as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
Neural search, RAG & question answering integrates Hybrid retrieval & reranking as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
Neural search, RAG & question answering integrates Provenance, citations & evidence tracking as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
Neural search, RAG & question answering integrates Vector-search and retrieval services as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
Neural search, RAG & question answering integrates Graph RAG & structured retrieval as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
In this atlas graph, Neural search, RAG & question answering has an `applies` dependency on Long-context attention, compression & summarization memory with `optional` strength.
In this atlas graph, Neural search, RAG & question answering has an `applies` dependency on External databases, APIs & live tools with `optional` strength.
